owner_confirmed_use: Primary visual-style reference for story, flirting and dating, relationships, entertainment, and broad social-issue content that may use AI-created imagery.
correction: Do not classify this only as a calm general-news layout. Its stronger value is showing that AI-assisted story and issue imagery can feel current, cinematic, and native to a modern social feed rather than like an old editorial illustration.
modern_visual_traits: vertical social-first framing rather than a horizontal article illustration placed inside a card
full-bleed scene with a strong subject or recognizable emotional situation
cinematic light, depth, crop, and atmosphere
realistic or polished contemporary stylization chosen per topic
minimal account branding that does not compete with the scene
short white headline placed directly over a darkened image area
consistent lower gradient and headline position across different media types
topic-dependent visual treatment instead of one repeated illustration renderer
avoid_old_style: thick decorative frames around every scene
long explanatory text inside the image
the same drawing style forced onto romance, celebrity, parenting, crime, and lifestyle topics
AI gloss without believable scene context

category_directions.visual_direction: one believable moment with unresolved tension and a cinematic crop
subtle proximity, eye line, gesture, phone, message, or place cues; contemporary styling rather than romantic clip art
emotion and distance expressed through body language, environment, and light
use actual connected media when available; otherwise use clearly generated contextual scenes without substituting an unrelated celebrity
recognizable context with restrained reenactment and an explicit generated or contextual-media distinction

first_screen_rules: Keep the SCAN IT-like account marker, headline placement, and gradient logic stable.
Allow realistic footage, photos, contemporary illustration, and generated scenes to coexist.
Unify mixed media through crop, headline scale, label placement, and tonal grading rather than making every image look identical.
Judge the result as part of a three-by-three account grid, not only as a single generated image.
prompt_requirements: state the exact emotional moment rather than requesting a generic mood
specify vertical editorial composition and text-safe lower area
describe believable body language and eye line
use cinematic but natural lighting appropriate to the scene
exclude retro illustration, clip art, generic stock posing, and excessive beauty filtering
